1.1: Bram — keeps the Beaten Drum at the lower edge of Oakhollow; learned on arrival, as travellers do.

2.2: Oakhollow, the town at the edge of Thornwood.
2.4: The Greymarch toll, two days south — a caravan guard's knowledge of the trade roads.

content._: What Cyrus has come to know — the names and terms recognisable. The soft reads this to decide who can be named; absence means perceived by appearance, and a learned name is appended here.
